description: Create a map layout in QGIS named 'Sample Data Map' using the polygon layer from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson and the point layer from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson. The layout must include a map showing both layers, a title 'San Francisco Bay Area - GIS Sample Data', a north arrow, a scale bar, and a legend. Export the final layout as a PDF to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sample_map.pdf.

metadata.expected_title: San Francisco Bay Area - GIS Sample Data
